message:
feat(platform): add holder-proof enforcement check, probe reservation system, ratelimit precision, hex decode fix

fcp-host enforcement (enforcement.rs):
- Add HolderProofCheck as the 4th check in the 11-check pipeline,
  validating that holder-bound capability tokens present a verified
  holder proof before proceeding to freshness/taint/policy checks
- Add holder_proof_required field to EnforcementContext and its
  builder, allowing callers to indicate whether the token carries
  a holder-binding constraint
- Update all pipeline count assertions from 10 to 11
- Add tests: holder_proof_skip_when_not_required, allow_when_verified,
  deny_when_required_but_not_verified, pipeline_evaluate_deny_at_holder_proof,
  builder_with_holder_proof_required, defaults check, clone check

fcp-host admin_state (admin_state.rs):
- Add FIXME documenting that signature_valid currently reflects
  structural validity only; cryptographic verification against the
  host keyring is deferred to a future version

fcp-host binary (bin/fcp-host.rs):
- Replace direct fs::write() with atomic temp-file + sync_all +
  rename pattern for connector config persistence, preventing
  partial writes on crash or power loss

fcp-host resilience (resilience.rs):
- Replace RoutingDecision-based can_route() with a reservation
  system: reserve_route() returns RouteReservation::AllowProbe with
  a ProbeReservation token that can be rolled back via
  cancel_probe_reservation() if downstream checks (circuit breaker,
  bulkhead) reject the request
- This prevents the probe cooldown timer from being consumed by
  requests that never actually reach the connector, improving
  recovery latency for unavailable connectors
- probe_requests metric now only increments when the probe actually
  executes, not when it's merely reserved
- Add probe_reservation_rolls_back_when_circuit_is_still_open() test
  verifying the full reservation → circuit-reject → rollback →
  re-probe → success lifecycle
- Use Duration::from_hours() for readability in EWMA test

fcp-ratelimit leaky_bucket (leaky_bucket.rs):
- Replace LEVEL_GUARD constant (0.5) with epsilon-based room
  calculation (1.0 - 1e-9), eliminating the half-request-unit
  guard band that could cause false capacity reports at high leak
  rates with tight scheduling
- Update is_limited calculation to use the same epsilon threshold
  for consistency

fcp-ratelimit sliding_window (sliding_window.rs):
- Make remaining(), wait_time(), and state() methods on FixedWindow
  read-only — they no longer mutate the window state (count/start)
  as a side effect of observation, which was causing phantom resets
  when multiple callers queried state concurrently

fcp-ratelimit (new file: leaky_spin_test.rs):
- Add dedicated spin-wait test for leaky bucket behavior

fcp-webhook signature (signature.rs):
- Map hex::decode errors to WebhookError::InvalidSignature instead
  of propagating the hex error type directly, providing a consistent
  error variant for all signature validation failures

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
